tagline: Your Sun City Pool Care Experts

hero.headline:
A Sparkling Pool Without
Lifting a Finger
hero.subheadline: You bought a pool to relax — not spend weekends scrubbing tiles and testing chemicals. Let Dan and Debbie handle everything so you can just dive in.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Pool Care for<br class="hidden md:block"> Sun City Homeowners
services.subtitle: From weekly maintenance to equipment repairs, we keep your pool crystal clear so you can spend your time enjoying the Arizona sun — not wrestling with chemicals.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Maintenance
cards.description: Full-service weekly care including water testing, chemical balancing, brushing, vacuuming, and filter maintenance. Your pool stays swim-ready every visit.

cards.title: Filter Deep Cleaning
cards.description: Thorough D.E. and cartridge filter disassembly, deep cleaning, inspection, and O-ring assessment. Recommended 1-3 times per year for peak performance.

cards.title: Green-to-Clean Recovery
cards.description: Neglected pool turned swampy green? We'll restore it to sparkling blue in 48-72 hours with our proven recovery process. Emergency response available.

cards.title: Water Chemistry Balancing
cards.description: Precise chemical management that keeps water safe, clear, and gentle on skin. Specialty chemicals like shock, stabilizer, and algaecides applied as needed.

cards.title: Equipment Repair & Parts
cards.description: Pumps, filters, skimmer baskets, gaskets, and more. We diagnose issues fast and carry common parts on our truck for same-visit repairs.

cards.title: Seasonal Pool Prep
cards.description: Getting ready for summer or winding down for winter? We prepare your pool and equipment for each Arizona season so nothing gets damaged.

how_it_works.headline: Three Simple Steps to a Spotless Pool

steps.title: Schedule Your Free Quote
steps.description: Call or text us about your pool. We'll visit, inspect your equipment, and provide an honest quote within 24 hours — no pressure, no obligation.

steps.title: We Take It From Here
steps.description: Dan or Debbie arrive on your scheduled day — on time, every time. Cleaning, chemicals, equipment checks, and detailed service records are all included.

steps.title: Relax and Enjoy
steps.description: Your pool stays crystal clear and swim-ready week after week. If anything isn't perfect, we come back and make it right — that's our promise.

about.label: Why Sun City Trusts Us
about.headline: Family-Owned, Owner-Operated — Every Single Visit
about.description: Dan and Debbie started Clean & Brite Pools over 10 years ago with a simple belief: pool owners deserve dependable, professional service from people who actually care. As a Sun City HOA-approved partner and Nextdoor Neighborhood Favorite, we treat every pool like it's our own — because our reputation depends on it.

features.title: Owner-Operated Every Visit
features.description: No random technicians. Dan personally services your pool each week, so you always know who's in your backyard.

features.title: No Contracts. Ever.
features.description: We earn your loyalty every visit. No long-term commitments, no cancellation fees, no hassle if you need to pause.

features.title: Sun City HOA Approved
features.description: We're an approved partner of the Sun City Home Owners Association — verified, insured, and trusted by your community.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Weekly service starting at $150/month. No contracts, no hidden fees — upgrade, downgrade, or cancel anytime.

guarantee.headline: Our "Crystal Clear" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you're ever not satisfied with a service visit, call us and we'll come back to make it right — at no extra charge. We don't consider the job done until your pool is sparkling and you're happy. That's the Clean & Brite promise.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start weekly service?
faqs.answer: Most new clients are on our schedule within 3-5 days. For green pool emergencies, we offer priority response. Just call or text and we'll find a time that works for you.

faqs.question: Do I need to be home when you service my pool?
faqs.answer: Not at all! Most of our Sun City clients provide gate access and we handle everything while you're out. You'll get a service record after each visit so you always know what was done.

faqs.question: What's included in the $150/month weekly service?
faqs.answer: Full water testing, chemical additions, equipment inspection, filter backwashing, brushing of steps and walls, vacuuming, debris netting, and onsite service records. Specialty chemicals are billed separately at cost.

faqs.question: What if I want to pause or cancel service?
faqs.answer: No problem at all. We don't do contracts or cancellation fees. Just let us know and we'll pause or stop service — no questions asked, no guilt trips.

faqs.question: Are you insured and HOA-approved?
faqs.answer: Yes! We carry full liability insurance and are an approved service partner of the Sun City Home Owners Association. We're also a BBB A+ rated business and Nextdoor Neighborhood Favorite.

testimonials.name: Robert M.
testimonials.text: Dan and Clean & Brite have serviced our pool for almost two years. They go out of their way to do the job quickly and correctly, and follow up every single time. Couldn't ask for better service.

testimonials.name: Janet P.
testimonials.text: We found Clean & Brite to be the perfect solution for our pool maintenance. Debbie and Dan are professional, thorough, and always within budget. Our pool has never looked better.

testimonials.name: Tom & Linda S.
testimonials.text: After trying two other pool companies that were unreliable, Clean & Brite has been a breath of fresh air. Owner-operated means consistent quality every single week. Highly recommend them.
